title: Trichotosia gracilis
taxonomy: Trichotosia gracilis belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family comprises approximately 32,000 known species of orchids, making it the largest family of flowering plants. Trichotosia gracilis is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, which contains many of the most common orchid species. The genus Trichotosia itself is part of the tribe Vandezeeiae, a group of small to medium-sized orchids with unique characteristics. Overall, the classification of Trichotosia gracilis reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the orchid family.
